[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: AI Agent (software & documentation)
- Amount: 0
- Description: feat(dao): [RETAIL FIELD REPORT EVENT] archive + audit + webhook
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/sentiment_importer/pull/1037
  
  Details:
  Added end-to-end handling for DApp [RETAIL FIELD REPORT EVENT] submissions so retail field reports are archived to both an audit sheet (Stores Visits Field Reports) and GitHub, and trigger a GAS webhook for Hit List update_status.
  
  What changed:
  - sentiment_importer/app/models/gdrive/stores_visits_field_reports.rb — new model for audit sheet logging
  - sentiment_importer/app/controllers/dao_controller.rb — parse_retail_field_report() + archive_retail_field_report() + trigger_immediate_processing webhook
  - sentiment_importer/config/application.rb — retail_field_report_processing_webhook_url config
  - Deployed to production hosts seni_ror (Rails) and seni_sk (Sidekiq)
  
  Why:
  Previously, [RETAIL FIELD REPORT EVENT] submissions from store_interaction_history.html were only logged to Telegram Chat Logs. There was no structured audit trail or Hit List update. This closes the gap.
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/sentiment_importer/pull/1037
- Contributor(s): Garyjob <garyjob@gmail.com>
- TDG Issued: 0
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
